sco-plots-gurgaon.footer_description:
SCO plot is a piece of land in which we can make a shop and an office depending on our preference and requirement. The ground floor is mainly used for Shop and Showroom purposes and the upper floors can be used for setting up your office or leasing to tenants. SCO plot developments give you the option of mixed-use property development where your showroom and backend office staff can be seated in the same building. As per the current DTCP policy as of 2024, Gurgaon SCO Plot owner can make the basement, ground, first, second, and third floors up to the max height of 15 meters of the building.

Before buying or even thinking about buying a SCO plot in Gurgaon we should know why there is a sudden rush to buy and invest in sco plots. Investors and commercial property buyers in Gurgaon and Delhi have always invested in commercial buildings developed by various top grade developers for their self-use or to generate rental income. The problem arises when the property purchased is not leased and is lying vacant as the owner is not able to find a tenant for the same or it is not a self acquired property of the owner, in such case huge CAM common area maintenance amount is paid by the owner of the property to the building maintenance department which is a huge financial burden. Also, another reason is the carpet area to super area ratio of the property purchased which in the new buildings is almost 50% of the area purchased i.e. if you are buying 10,000 sq. ft. commercial office space or shop in Gurgaon you actually get only 5,000 sq. ft. of actual usable carpet area which is very less by any standards.

Here comes the solution to these problems, SCO plots in Gurgaon which overcomes both of the above challenges an owner faces in terms of high monthly maintenance and low carpet area. Sco plots offer huge advantages to the investor as well as the actual user of the space both owner as well as the tenant. We have compiled a list of several advantages of owning a SCO plot in Gurgaon.

High FAR : Floor area Ratio is the the amount of square feet area that can be developed by the owner in the SCO Plot which goes to as high as 4.3X of the plot size (approx). This means if you have purchased a SCO plot in gurgaon of 100 sq.yds. You will get a built-up area of about 3900 sq.ft (calculations are approximate and may change as per govt policies decided vy DTCP Haryana). This is a huge win win compared to buying a commercial office space in a commercial building or mall.

Advantages of buying SCO Plot in Gurgaon

Premium and High Rental Returns : There are various organisations and business owners who look for their private independent showrooms and offices and dont want to share their space with other building occupants. These companies are willing to offer premium rentals for the offices and showrooms made in sco plots in Gurgaon as it is their own independent business identity and separates them from the crown.

Flexible Usage Policy : SCO plots can be put to various uses depending on the type of tenant of personal use requirements. SCO plots can be used for office space, showroom space, retail showroom space, setting up of coworking space on rent and can even be used for residential purpose. This unique preposition makes it a great investment product.

Re-Development Possibility : As you are the owner of the plot of lans underneath the building you have made on your SCO plot , you have the liberty to re-structure, re-design and re-build the whole building if required anytime in the future to increase the capital value of your property.

Capital Value Appreciation : Plots in Gurgaon have always given more return on investment than conventional built-up offices and apartments. Plot as we all know whether residential or commercial has been the favourite choice of inventors and end users across Gurgaon making it the best investment for property capital appreciation. SCO plots have the potential to give windfall gains to investors if bought at the right location and through the right advisor.

Loan Against Property : As buildings made on SCO plots are given on long-term lease rental which guarantees a good and guaranteed rental income to the owner, they can be used to secure good loan amounts from the bank with which the property owner can make other investments in real estate, equity or gold enabling him to generate revenue from various streams. 

As Gurgaon is the most developing and emerging area of Delhi-NCR and due to its proximity to the Delhi International Airport buying SCO plots in Gurgaon is an intelligent investment choice giving you great return and magnitude of financial benefits.
